page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g8a.large is a general-purpose virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features an x86_64 architecture with 2 dedicated physical cores and 2 vCPUs, utilizing the AMD EPYC 9T24 processor running at 2.7 GHz. The hardware configuration includes 8.0 GB of system memory, providing 4.0 GB of RAM per core. This instance does not include local storage or dedicated GPU hardware, and it is provisioned with a baseline network bandwidth of 2 Gbps.

Performance benchmarks reveal a distinct contrast between single-core and multi-core capabilities. The AMD EPYC processor delivers strong single-core CPU performance, scoring 3070.98 in stress-ng tests, which places it in the top 25% of tested instances. However, multi-core CPU performance is limited, with a stress-ng multi-core score of 3073.48, categorizing it in the bottom 25%. Memory bandwidth tests show a read-only large block speed of 38.17 GB/sec and a write large block speed of 27.73 GB/sec. Single-threaded operations, such as gzip compression at 29.0 GB/sec and bzip3 decompression at 13.2 GB/sec, perform at average levels.

Given the dedicated CPU allocation and strong single-core performance, the ecs.g8a.large is suitable for workloads that do not require massive parallel processing but benefit from consistent CPU access. Tradeoffs include lower multi-core scaling and weak performance in database operations and Redis SET benchmarks, which scored 2.85 million operations per second. This instance is best suited for lightweight web serving, single-threaded application tasks, development environments, and general-purpose workloads that fit within the 8.0 GB memory envelope without demanding high-speed local storage.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g8a.large is a general-purpose instance featuring 2 dedicated vCPUs and 8.0 GB of RAM, powered by an AMD EPYC 9T24 processor running at 2.7 GHz. Built on the x86_64 architecture and managed via the KVM hypervisor, this instance provides a balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio but lacks local storage and GPU accelerators. Benchmark data highlights strong single-core CPU performance, though multi-core scaling and database operations fall into lower performance tiers. With a baseline network bandwidth of 2 Gbps, the ecs.g8a.large is well-suited for lightweight web serving, single-threaded application tasks, and general-purpose development environments that require dedicated CPU resources without massive parallel processing demands.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g8a.large is a general-purpose instance featuring 2 dedicated AMD EPYC vCPUs, 8.0 GB of RAM, and a 2 Gbps network baseline, optimized for single-threaded tasks and lightweight workloads.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g8a.large is a general-purpose instance with 2 dedicated AMD EPYC vCPUs, 8.0 GB RAM, and 2 Gbps network bandwidth.
tagline: A dedicated dual-core virtual server delivering strong single-thread performance and balanced memory for general-purpose computing workloads.
bullet_points: Powered by a 2.7 GHz AMD EPYC 9T24 processor with 2 dedicated vCPUs
Equipped with 8.0 GB of system memory and 2 Gbps baseline network bandwidth
Strong single-core CPU performance suitable for single-threaded execution
Lacks local storage and GPU acceleration, relying on network-attached storage
Best suited for lightweight web serving, development, and basic application hosting
